song_name: The Heart Wants What It Wants
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
STANDARD TUNING w/ CAPO ON 3

* = one strum


[Intro]

[ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]
You got me sipping on something[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
I can't compare to nothing[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
I've ever known I'm hoping[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]
That after this fever I'll survive[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]
I know I'm acting a bit crazy[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Am[/ch]
Strung out, a little bit hazy[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
Hand over heart, I'm praying[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]
That I'm gonna make it out alive[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]
The bed's getting cold and you're not here[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]
The future that we hold is so unclear[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
But I'm not alive until you call[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                   
And I'll bet the odds against it all[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Save your advice 'cause I won't hear[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]
You might be right but I don't care[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]                                    [ch]G[/ch]
There's a million reasons why I should give you up[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
But the heart wants what it wa-a-a-a-ants[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
The heart wants what it wa-a-a-a-ants[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]
You got me scattered in pieces[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
Shining like stars and screaming[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Em[/ch]
Lightening me up like Venus[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G[/ch]
But then you disappear and make me wait[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]
And every second's like torture[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]
Heroin drip, no more so[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
Finding a way to let go[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
Baby baby no I can't escape[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]
The bed's getting cold and you're not here[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]
The future that we hold is so unclear[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
But I'm not alive until you call[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                   
And I'll bet the odds against it all[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Save your advice 'cause I won't hear[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]
You might be right but I don't care[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]                                    [ch]G[/ch]
There's a million reasons why I should give you up[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
But the heart wants what it wa-a-a-a-ants[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
The heart wants what it wa-a-a-a-ants[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
The heart wants what it wa-a-a-a-ants[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
The heart wants what it wa-a-a-a-ants[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
This is a modern fairy-tale[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]
No happy endings[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
No wind in our sails[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
But I can't imagine a life without[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]
Breathless moments[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
Breaking me down, down, down, down[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]*
The bed's getting cold and you're not here[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]*
The future that we hold is so unclear[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]*
But I'm not alive until you call[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]*                   
And I'll bet the odds against it all[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Save your advice 'cause I won't hear[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]
You might be right but I don't care[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]                                    [ch]G[/ch]
There's a million reasons why I should give you up[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
But the heart wants what it wa-a-a-a-ants[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
The heart wants what it wa-a-a-a-ants[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
But the heart wants what it wa-a-a-a-ants[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
The heart wants what it wa-a-a-a-ants[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]
The heart wants what it wants baby[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
It wants what it wants baby[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
It wants what it wants[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]
It wants what it wants[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]   
The heart wants what it wants baby[/tab]
